title: Morettia philaeana
taxonomy: Morettia philaeana is classified as a species within the plant family Commelinaceae, commonly known as the spiderwort family. It belongs to the genus Morettia, which is a small group of flowering plants. Morettia philaeana is native to Egypt and is often found growing in dry, sandy areas. This plant is known for its small white flowers and slender stems. Morettia philaeana is considered an endangered species due to habitat loss and degradation.
